div.style: border:1px solid black; width:98%;border-radius: 5px; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; overflow: hidden;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding: 4px 0px 4px 6px;word-break: break-word;font-size:14px;

table.style: height: 218px; border-radius: 5px; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; overflow: hidden;border:1px solid black;

td.style: text-align: start; vertical-align: middle; height: 10%;font-size: 13px;border-top:none;border-right:none;border-bottom:none;border-left:thin solid #C8C8C8;
text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; height: 10%; font-size: 13px;border-right:none;border-top:none;
text-align: start; vertical-align: middle; height: 10%;font-size: 13px;border-top:none;border-right:none;border-bottom:none;border-left:thin solid #C8C8C8;
text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; height: 10%; font-size: 13px;border-right:none;border-top:none;border-bottom:none;
text-align: start; vertical-align: middle; height: 10%;font-size: 13px;border-top:none;border-right:none;border-bottom:none;border-left:thin solid #C8C8C8;
text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; height: 10%; font-size: 13px;border-right:none;border-top:none;
text-align: start; vertical-align: middle; height: 15%;font-size: 13px;border-top:none;border-right:none;border-left:thin solid #C8C8C8;
text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; height: 15%; font-size: 13px; border-right: none; border-top: none;
text-align: start; vertical-align: middle; height: 15%;font-size: 13px;border-top:none;border-right:none;border-left:thin solid #C8C8C8;
text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; height: 15%; font-size: 13px; border-right: none; border-top: none;
text-align: start; vertical-align: middle; height: 15%;font-size: 13px;border-top:none;border-right:none;border-left:thin solid #C8C8C8;
text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; height: 15%; font-size: 13px; border-right: none; border-top: none;

th.style: width:11%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:30%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:11%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:11%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:11%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:11%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:15%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:11%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:30%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:11%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:11%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:11%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:11%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:15%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:11%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:30%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:11%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:11%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:11%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:11%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:15%; vertical-align: middle; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:16%; padding:10px; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333; border-left:0.5px solid #333333;
width:17%; padding:10px; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:17%; padding:10px; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:17%; padding:10px; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:16%; padding:10px; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333;
width:16%; padding:10px; border-bottom:0.5px solid #333333; border-top:0.5px solid #333333; border-right:0.5px solid #333333;
